mapper.select: SELECT c.*, t.name AS teacher_name FROM course c LEFT JOIN teacher t ON c.teacher_id = t.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
SELECT c.*, t.name AS teacher_name FROM course c LEFT JOIN teacher t ON c.teacher_id = t.id ORDER BY c.id
SELECT c.*, t.name AS teacher_name FROM course c LEFT JOIN teacher t ON c.teacher_id = t.id WHERE c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} ORDER BY c.id
SELECT c.*, t.name AS teacher_name FROM course c LEFT JOIN teacher t ON c.teacher_id = t.id INNER JOIN student_course sc ON c.id = sc.course_id WHERE sc.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY c.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course (course_no, course_name, credit, hours, teacher_id) VALUES (#{courseNo}, #{courseName}, #{credit}, #{hours}, #{teacherId})
